hook.text: REAL MADRID OPEN DOOR ON TCHOUAMENI SALE

beats.text: UNITED ARE TRACKING HIM TO REPLACE CASEMIRO
MADRID WANT £84M AND LIVERPOOL ARE ALSO KEEN
MADRID NEED FUNDS TO SIGN CHELSEA'S ENZO FERNANDEZ

caption: A new United midfield target has emerged 🔴 Real Madrid are willing to sell Aurélien Tchouaméni this summer — and Manchester United are watching. Carrick's side are looking for a dynamic midfielder to replace Casemiro, and the 26-year-old France international ticks every box. The price? Madrid want £84m, and Liverpool are also circling. Madrid need the funds to pursue Chelsea's Enzo Fernandez. Is Tchouaméni worth £84m for United? 👇 REPORTED — per Sports Mole / SI. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
